headline: Man's 'Just The Tip' Of The Iceberg Apology Was Actually The Entire Apology, Which Was Terrible
summary: 'I'm sorry you feel that way' was the iceberg. There was no iceberg. Just the tip.
fullBody: Jake Nonpology delivered the worst apology in history: 'I'm sorry you feel that way, but also you're wrong.' He called it 'the tip of the iceberg' of apologies. There was no iceberg. His girlfriend has started a podcast called 'Why Men Can't Apologize.' Jake has since apologized for his apology. It was also terrible. The podcast now has 1 million subscribers. Jake is the recurring guest. He's still not getting it.
